message:
fix: strip cert-manager/common issue template headers, leading colons, and WIP text (#567)

- Add bold-header patterns for cert-manager templates (**Describe the bug**,
  **Is your feature request**, **Expected behavior**, etc.)
- Strip leading colons left after bold-header removal (e.g. "**Desc:** text" → ": text")
- Strip WIP/draft strikethrough text (~This PR is not ready~)
- Add quality gate check: reject solutions starting with lone colon

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
